action.reasoning: Observation: The model has plateaued at val_r2=0.5799 (internal) / 0.519 (eval). Training for 20 more epochs didn't improve beyond 0.5799. The model is stuck. With only 0.571h remaining (~34 min), I can only do ~1 more training run of ~16 epochs. Analysis: The current best checkpoint gives eval mean_r2=0.519. I should submit eval with the current best checkpoint to lock in this score, since I'm running out of time. The model has converged and further training isn't helping. Decision: Submit eval with current best checkpoint.
